tool_args.label: November Plan presents balanced budget annually through 2027

payload.claim_text: The November Plan continues to present a balanced budget annually through 2027.

tool_args.label: Fare evasion on buses has increased

payload.claim_text: Fare evasion on buses has increased over the past few months.
payload.subject: MTA bus fare evasion

tool_args.label: Casino revenue risk to financial plan

payload.claim_text: The approval, and awarding, of downstate casino licenses is uncertain in both outcome and timing, which risks the $500 million assumed to be received by MTA in 2026 and 2027.
payload.subject: casino revenue risk

payload.claim_text: There is a risk that recent litigation could impact this start date and timing of receipt of congestion pricing revenues for the capital program.
payload.subject: Central Business District Tolling Program

payload.claim_text: The Plan assumes a 10 percent point increase in paid ridership recovery by 2026.
payload.subject: paid ridership recovery

payload.claim_text: A fare-free bus pilot program on five bus routes, lasting six to twelve months, was also authorized.
payload.subject: fare-free bus pilot

payload.claim_text: Automated Bus Lane Enforcement (ABLE) measures through camera installation on additional buses and expanded enforcement, as permitted through the State 2023-24 Enacted Budget ($80M).
payload.subject: Automated Bus Lane Enforcement
